strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
Distributed-systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second with low-latency DLang services
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership (CTO/VP) or scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+ people
Lacks demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems and fintech/regulated-environment ownership at required depth
Title history tops out at Staff/Senior IC; no track record of board-level communication or hybrid-delivery governance
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned individual contributor with strong full-stack and distributed-systems breadth, plus emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the role calls for an executive who has architected production multi-agent systems, scaled engineering organizations, and operated in regulated fintech contexts — areas where the resume does not show direct evidence.
